compiler"}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":1,"created_at":"2024-09-01T03:26:39Z","updated_at":"2024-09-01T13:46:10Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"I particularly like https://fortran-lang.discourse.group/t/fortran-code-snippets/2150/72, which I am copying here for reference:
```fortran
program mandelbrot_area
use mpi_f08
implicit none
logical mp_mpi
integer np_mpi,lp_mpi,ierror,n,i,j
real(8) area
complex(8) c
! determine the number of MPI processes and the local process rank
call mpi_init(ierror)
call mpi_comm_size(mpi_comm_world,np_mpi,ierror)
call mpi_comm_rank(mpi_comm_world,lp_mpi,ierror)
! flag for master process
mp_mpi=.false.
if (lp_mpi == 0) then
  mp_mpi=.true.
  write(*,'("Number of MPI processes : ",I6)') np_mpi
! open file for writing area vs n
  open(50,file='MANDELBROT_AREA.OUT',form='FORMATTED')
end if
! loop over grid sizes
do n=2**12,2**20,2**10
  if (mp_mpi) write(*,'("Evaluating n = ",I8)') n
  area=0.d0
!$OMP PARALLEL DO DEFAULT(SHARED) &
!$OMP PRIVATE(c,j) REDUCTION(+:area) &
!$OMP SCHEDULE(DYNAMIC)
  do i=1,n
    if (mod(i-1,np_mpi) /= lp_mpi) cycle
    c%re=-2.d0+2.49d0*dble(i-1)/dble(n)
    do j=1,n/2
      c%im=1.15d0*dble(j-1)/dble(n/2)
      if (c%re**2+c%im**2 > 4.d0) cycle
      if (julia(c)) area=area+1.d0
    end do
  end do
!$OMP END PARALLEL DO
! add the areas from each MPI process and distribute
  if (np_mpi > 1) then
    call mpi_allreduce(mpi_in_place,area,1,mpi_real8,mpi_sum,mpi_comm_world, &
     ierror)
  end if
  area=4.d0*2.49d0*1.15d0*area/dble(n)**2
  if (mp_mpi) then
    write(*,'("Area of Mandelbrot set : ",G18.10)') area
    write(50,'(2G18.10)') 1.d0/dble(n),area
    flush(50)
  end if
end do
if (mp_mpi) close(50)
call mpi_finalize(ierror)

contains

pure logical function julia(c)
implicit none
complex(8), intent(in) :: c
integer i
complex(8) z
z=c
do i=1,n/8
  z=(((((((z**2+c)**2+c)**2+c)**2+c)**2+c)**2+c)**2+c)**2+c
  if (z%re**2+z%im**2 > 4.d0) then
    julia=.false.
    return
  end if
end do
julia=.true.
end function

end program
```

particularly like https://fortran-lang.discourse.group/t/fortran-code-snippets/2150/72, which I am copying here for reference:
```fortran
program mandelbrot_area
use mpi_f08
implicit none
logical mp_mpi
integer np_mpi,lp_mpi,ierror,n,i,j
real(8) area
complex(8) c
! determine the number of MPI processes and the local process rank
call mpi_init(ierror)
call mpi_comm_size(mpi_comm_world,np_mpi,ierror)
call mpi_comm_rank(mpi_comm_world,lp_mpi,ierror)
! flag for master process
mp_mpi=.false.
if (lp_mpi == 0) then
  mp_mpi=.true.
  write(*,'("Number of MPI processes : ",I6)') np_mpi
! open file for writing area vs n
  open(50,file='MANDELBROT_AREA.OUT',form='FORMATTED')
end if
! loop over grid sizes
do n=2**12,2**20,2**10
  if (mp_mpi) write(*,'("Evaluating n = ",I8)') n
  area=0.d0
!$OMP PARALLEL DO DEFAULT(SHARED) &
!$OMP PRIVATE(c,j) REDUCTION(+:area) &
!$OMP SCHEDULE(DYNAMIC)
  do i=1,n
    if (mod(i-1,np_mpi) /= lp_mpi) cycle
    c%re=-2.d0+2.49d0*dble(i-1)/dble(n)
    do j=1,n/2
      c%im=1.15d0*dble(j-1)/dble(n/2)
      if (c%re**2+c%im**2 > 4.d0) cycle
      if (julia(c)) area=area+1.d0
    end do
  end do
!$OMP END PARALLEL DO
! add the areas from each MPI process and distribute
  if (np_mpi > 1) then
    call mpi_allreduce(mpi_in_place,area,1,mpi_real8,mpi_sum,mpi_comm_world, &
     ierror)
  end if
  area=4.d0*2.49d0*1.15d0*area/dble(n)**2
  if (mp_mpi) then
    write(*,'("Area of Mandelbrot set : ",G18.10)') area
    write(50,'(2G18.10)') 1.d0/dble(n),area
    flush(50)
  end if
end do
if (mp_mpi) close(50)
call mpi_finalize(ierror)

contains

pure logical function julia(c)
implicit none
complex(8), intent(in) :: c
integer i
complex(8) z
z=c
do i=1,n/8
  z=(((((((z**2+c)**2+c)**2+c)**2+c)**2+c)**2+c)**2+c)**2+c
  if (z%re**2+z%im**2 > 4.d0) then
    julia=.false.
    return
  end if
end do
julia=.true.
end function

end program
```

use mpi_f08
implicit none
logical mp_mpi
integer np_mpi, lp_mpi, ierror, n, i, j
real(8) area
complex(8) c

! determine the number of MPI processes and the local process rank
call mpi_init(ierror)
if (ierror /= MPI_SUCCESS) then
    write(*,*) "Error initializing MPI"
    stop
end if
call mpi_comm_size(mpi_comm_world, np_mpi, ierror)
call mpi_comm_rank(mpi_comm_world, lp_mpi, ierror)

! flag for master process
mp_mpi = .false.
if (lp_mpi == 0) then
    mp_mpi = .true.
    write(*, '("Number of MPI processes : ", I6)') np_mpi
    ! open file for writing area vs n
    open(50, file='MANDELBROT_AREA.OUT', form='FORMATTED', status='REPLACE', iostat=ierror)
    if (ierror /= 0) then
        write(*,*) "Error opening output file"
        call mpi_finalize(ierror)
        stop
    end if
end if

! loop over grid sizes
do n = 2**20, 2**12, -2**10
    if (mp_mpi) write(*, '("Evaluating n = ", I8)') n
    area = 0.d0

!$OMP PARALLEL DO DEFAULT(SHARED) &
!$OMP PRIVATE(c, j) REDUCTION(+:area) &
!$OMP SCHEDULE(DYNAMIC)
    do i = 1, n
        if (mod(i-1, np_mpi) /= lp_mpi) cycle
        c%re = -2.d0 + 2.49d0 * dble(i-1) / dble(n)
        do j = 1, n / 2
            c%im = 1.15d0 * dble(j-1) / dble(n/2)
            if (c%re**2 + c%im**2 > 4.d0) cycle
            if (julia(c, n)) area = area + 1.d0
        end do
    end do
!$OMP END PARALLEL DO

    ! add the areas from each MPI process and distribute
    if (np_mpi > 1) then
        call mpi_allreduce(mpi_in_place, area, 1, MPI_DOUBLE_PRECISION, mpi_sum, mpi_comm_world, ierror)
    end if
    area = 4.d0 * 2.49d0 * 1.15d0 * area / dble(n)**2
    if (mp_mpi) then
        write(*, '("Area of Mandelbrot set : ", G18.10)') area
        write(50, '(2G18.10)') 1.d0 / dble(n), area
        flush(50)
    end if
end do

if (mp_mpi) close(50)
call mpi_finalize(ierror)

contains

pure logical function julia(c, n)
    implicit none
    complex(8), intent(in) :: c
    integer, intent(in) :: n
    integer i
    complex(8) z
    z = c
    do i = 1, n / 8
        z = ((((((((z**2 + c)**2 + c)**2 + c)**2 + c)**2 + c)**2 + c)**2 + c)**2 + c)
        if (z%re**2 + z%im**2 > 4.d0) then
            julia = .false.
            return
        end if
    end do
    julia = .true.
end function

end program

{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran/issues/4728","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran/issues/4728/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran/issues/4728/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran/issues/4728/events","html_url":"https://github.com/lfortran/lfortran/issues/4728","id":2499482930,"node_id":"I_kwDOCpMuHc6U-xUy","number":4728,"title":"Enhanced MPI-Parallelized Mandelbrot Area Calculator in Fortran","user":{"login":"radesh20","id":131537022,"node_id":"U_kgDOB9cYfg","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/131537022?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/radesh20","html_url":"https://github.com/radesh20","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/radesh20/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/radesh20/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/radesh20/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/radesh20/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/radesh20/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/radesh20/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/radesh20/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/radesh20/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/radesh20/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-09-01T13:53:27Z","updated_at":"2024-09-01T13:53:27Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"Corrected the loop over grid sizes to decrement n.
Replaced mpi_real8 with MPI_DOUBLE_PRECISION.
Passed n as an argument to the julia function.
Added proper OpenMP directives closing.
Checked for MPI initialization errors.
Added file opening error handling.



program mandelbrot_area
use mpi_f08
implicit none
logical mp_mpi
integer np_mpi, lp_mpi, ierror, n, i, j
real(8) area
complex(8) c

! determine the number of MPI processes and the local process rank
call mpi_init(ierror)
if (ierror /= MPI_SUCCESS) then
    write(*,*) "Error initializing MPI"
    stop
end if
call mpi_comm_size(mpi_comm_world, np_mpi, ierror)
call mpi_comm_rank(mpi_comm_world, lp_mpi, ierror)

! flag for master process
mp_mpi = .false.
if (lp_mpi == 0) then
    mp_mpi = .true.
    write(*, '("Number of MPI processes : ", I6)') np_mpi
    ! open file for writing area vs n
    open(50, file='MANDELBROT_AREA.OUT', form='FORMATTED', status='REPLACE', iostat=ierror)
    if (ierror /= 0) then
        write(*,*) "Error opening output file"
        call mpi_finalize(ierror)
        stop
    end if
end if

! loop over grid sizes
do n = 2**20, 2**12, -2**10
    if (mp_mpi) write(*, '("Evaluating n = ", I8)') n
    area = 0.d0

!$OMP PARALLEL DO DEFAULT(SHARED) &
!$OMP PRIVATE(c, j) REDUCTION(+:area) &
!$OMP SCHEDULE(DYNAMIC)
    do i = 1, n
        if (mod(i-1, np_mpi) /= lp_mpi) cycle
        c%re = -2.d0 + 2.49d0 * dble(i-1) / dble(n)
        do j = 1, n / 2
            c%im = 1.15d0 * dble(j-1) / dble(n/2)
            if (c%re**2 + c%im**2 > 4.d0) cycle
            if (julia(c, n)) area = area + 1.d0
        end do
    end do
!$OMP END PARALLEL DO

    ! add the areas from each MPI process and distribute
    if (np_mpi > 1) then
        call mpi_allreduce(mpi_in_place, area, 1, MPI_DOUBLE_PRECISION, mpi_sum, mpi_comm_world, ierror)
    end if
    area = 4.d0 * 2.49d0 * 1.15d0 * area / dble(n)**2
    if (mp_mpi) then
        write(*, '("Area of Mandelbrot set : ", G18.10)') area
        write(50, '(2G18.10)') 1.d0 / dble(n), area
        flush(50)
    end if
end do

if (mp_mpi) close(50)
call mpi_finalize(ierror)

contains

pure logical function julia(c, n)
    implicit none
    complex(8), intent(in) :: c
    integer, intent(in) :: n
    integer i
    complex(8) z
    z = c
    do i = 1, n / 8
        z = ((((((((z**2 + c)**2 + c)**2 + c)**2 + c)**2 + c)**2 + c)**2 + c)**2 + c)
        if (z%re**2 + z%im**2 > 4.d0) then
            julia = .false.
            return
        end if
    end do
    julia = .true.
end function

end program
